frontmatter_compliance.notes: Required fields present and well-formed; allowed-tools hyphenated; but composes_with references 4 skills not in this repo (ui-ux-pro-max, frontend-design, brainstorming, ux-review).

description_quality.notes: Description is 1449 chars (measured) — exceeds 1024-char hard ceiling. HARD FAIL per audit checklist. Content itself is excellent (pushy, action-verb-led, exhaustive triggers).

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 186 lines / ~3000 words; brief-template.md (274 lines) is a sensible reference; body could trim Step 1-5 prose.

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; two-mode split; five-step flow with verification checklist; explains WHY; anti-patterns table is excellent.

coordination.notes: 4 of 7 composes_with entries do not exist as in-repo skills; semantic ambiguity if they're meant as external plugin refs.

completeness.notes: brief-template.md reference exists. 'Examples' section references external project files (THE-GAUNTLET.md at AllTheSkills repo, UI-CHALLENGE.md at MarketsBeRigged repo) that may be inaccessible.

anti_patterns.notes: Hardcoded old project name 'AllTheSkills' (line 183); MUST used sparingly with justification; no body↔reference duplication.
